sglang.title: fix test_embedding_models prompt length too long's bug
sglang.author: BBuf

sglang.title: support parallel grammar preprocessing
sglang.author: DarkSharpness
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This pull request aims to improve the efficiency of grammar preprocessing by enabling parallel processing, which will reduce potential blocking (hopefully).
Modifications

Previously, grammar preprocessing was performed synchronously, which could block other processes like prefill and de

sglang.title: Refactor grammar backend
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Fix the hanging bug introduced in #1996
Fix the bug that jump-forward is not triggered
Split the two backends into two separate files. Only import a file when a backend is used.

vllm.title: [CI][CPU]refactor CPU tests to allow to bind with different cores
vllm.author: zhouyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This patch modified the CPU tests to allow configurable  binding cores

vllm.title: [BugFix] Do not raise a `ValueError` when `tool_choice` is set to the supported `none` option and `tools` are not defined.
vllm.author: gcalmettes
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the raise of a ValueError  when tool_choice is set to the supported none value.
Currently, the ChatCompletionRequest object supports the none and auto options for the tool_choice field.
However, setting tool_choice to none will raise an error as the current validation check is expectin

vllm.title: [Misc]Fix Idefics3Model argument
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The Idefics3 tests are currently skipped in the vllm CI due to the transformers version, which led to ignoring the argument modifications for this model. Similar issues might exist in other models as well, so further checks may be needed.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix QwenModel argument
vllm.author: DamonFool
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The QWen models fail to run due to incorrect argument.

vllm.title: [Frontend] Add per-request number of cached token stats
vllm.author: zifeitong
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The PR implements OpenAI's new API and adds the number of cached token stats for each request.
This feature guarded by a flag in OpenAI endpoints and is OFF by default.

Thank you for your contribution to vLLM! Before submitting the pull request, please ensure the

vllm.title: [V1] Use pickle for serializing EngineCoreRequest & Add multimodal inputs to EngineCoreRequest
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds multimodal inputs to EngineCoreRequest before adding proper support for VLMs in #9871.
Since the multimodal inputs include types incompatible with msgspec (e.g., PIL images), we use pickle for serializing/de-serializing EngineCoreRequest.

vllm.title: [Encoder Decoder] Update Mllama to run with both FlashAttention and XFormers
vllm.author: sroy745
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In this pr we update Mllama to run on both xFormers and Flash Attention backend. Currently it runs only with the xFormers backend. This pr makes the following changes

Updates mllama.py to run with both xFormers and FlashAttention. There were 2 changes needed for this (a) update attention_with_mask

vllm.title: [LoRA] Adds support for bias in LoRA
vllm.author: followumesh
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
PEFT, https://github.com/foundation-model-stack/fms-hf-tuning includes support for tuning LoRA bias. This PR enables bias for lora, so the adapters with bias will work with vLLM.
Changes Included

LoRA bias support for different types of modules.
LoRA bias support for fully sharded LoRA.

vllm.title: [V1] Enable Inductor when using piecewise CUDA graphs
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Unfortunately, after the PR #10228   piecewise CUDA graph generates gibberish outputs. For some reason, we have to turn on the inductors and disable the custom CUDA kernels when using piecewise CUDA graphs.
Note that the following error message appears when using the CUDA graphs in V1 (although it f

vllm.title: Revert "[ci][build] limit cmake version"
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: fixes #10189 , since the new cmake version 3.31 bugfix is released.

vllm.title: [V1] Fix CI tests on V1 engine
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes the CI tests broken after #10245

vllm.title: [core][distributed] use tcp store directly
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: inspired by pytorch/rfcs#71 (comment) , we can use https://pytorch.org/docs/stable/distributed.html#torch.distributed.TCPStore directly, instead of depending on internal APIs like rendezvous and prefix store.

vllm.title: [V1] Support VLMs with fine-grained scheduling
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR implements the basic vision language model support in V1.
Motivation
Multi-modal inputs are difficult to deal with because they often have complex (or non-trivial) dependencies. For example, the model can take a prompt with interleaved texts and images like

Here, different colors represent

vllm.title: [Doc] Fix typo in arg_utils.py
vllm.author: xyang16
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix typo in the help message of the "--max-cpu-loras" argument. It should be ">= than max_loras".

vllm.title: [Model] Add support for Qwen2-VL video embeddings input & multiple image embeddings input with varied resolutions
vllm.author: imkero
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Goal


Add support for Qwen2-VL multiple image embeddings input with varied resolutions
currently, vLLM implementation of Qwen2-VL's image embedding input requires all images in the input have the same resolution, however Qwen2-VL supports varied image resolution (with vision token num varied as wel
